title: Recipe for Disaster: Freeing Skrach Uglogwee

startPoint.en: Inspect Skrach Uglogwee in the banquet hall in Lumbridge Castle.
startPoint.es: Inspecciona a Skrach Uglogwee en el salón de banquetes del Castillo de Lumbridge.

quests.title: Recipe for Disaster: Another Cook's Quest

items.name: Raw chompy
items.display: 1 Raw chompy (if you don't burn the food, only one is needed)

items.name: Ogre bow
items.display: Ogre bow or Comp ogre bow

items.name: Ogre arrows
items.display: Ogre arrows or brutal arrows (bring extras or make more just in case you lose some)

rewards.name: Karamja
rewards.display: Able to use the boat trip to travel between Karamja and Feldip Hills (you must pay a fee of chompies or exotic herbs that can be found on Karamja, such as rogue's purse)

The ability to hunt jubblies (counts for 1 point when hunting chompies, though provides more range experience when killed, and big bones as a drop when killed, and the raw jubbly gives more experience when cooked than a raw chompy)

text.en: Inspect Skrach Uglogwee.
text.es: Inspecciona a Skrach Uglogwee.

chatOptions: 1 Yes, I'm sure I can get some Jubbly Chompy.
2 Oh Ok then, I guess I'll talk to Rantz.

text.en: Head to Feldip Hills AKS and talk to Rantz to the north-east.
text.es: Dirígete a Feldip Hills y habla con Rantz al noreste.

chatOptions: 1 I'm trying to free Skrach. Can you help?

text.en: Follow the coast south and talk to Rantz.
text.es: Sigue la costa hacia el sur y habla con Rantz.

chatOptions: 1 I guess this is the watery place. What now?

text.en: Cut the roots of the old tree, carve it
text.es: Corta las raíces del viejo árbol, tállalo

text.en: Talk to Rantz.
text.es: Habla con Rantz.

chatOptions: 1 Okay, the boat's ready; now tell me how to get a jubbly.

text.en: With a raw chompy, iron spit, and logs, teleport to the Karamja lodestone.
text.es: Con un chompy crudo, un espetón de hierro y troncos, teletranspórtate a la piedra de viaje de Karamja.

text.en: Head south until a row boat is seen along the western coast. Just south-east of the boat is a small tree with Rantz's arrow stuck in it.
text.es: Dirígete hacia el sur hasta que veas un bote de remos a lo largo de la costa occidental. Justo al sureste del bote hay un árbol pequeño con la flecha de Rantz clavada en él.

text.en: Use the iron spit on the raw chompy and light a fire just west of the small tree.
text.es: Usa el espetón de hierro en el chompy crudo y enciende una hoguera justo al oeste del árbol pequeño.

text.en: Cook the chompy on the fire.
text.es: Cocina el chompy en la hoguera.

text.en: Board the nearby ogre boat.
text.es: Sube al barco ogro cercano.

chatOptions: 1 Yes please, I'll get a lift back with you.

text.en: Talk to Rantz.
text.es: Habla con Rantz.

chatOptions: 1 Okay, now tell me how to get jubbly.

text.en: Make a balloon toad by using the following steps (it is advised to make a few in the event you burn the raw jubbly).
text.es: Fabrica un sapo globo siguiendo estos pasos (se recomienda hacer varios por si quemas el jubbly crudo).

text.en: Just west, fill your ogre bellows with swamp bubbles from the swamp, then use the bellows on a swamp toad.
text.es: Justo al oeste, llena tus fuelles de ogro con burbujas de pantano del pantano, luego usa los fuelles en un sapo de pantano.

text.en: Directly west of the swamp pool, mine a feldip swamp rock (near AKS).
text.es: Directamente al oeste de la charca del pantano, extrae una roca del pantano de Feldip (cerca de).

text.en: With the rock, toad, and a ball of wool in your inventory, use the bellows on the bloated toad again to make a balloon toad (the bellows must be filled).
text.es: Con la roca, el sapo y una bola de lana en tu inventario, usa los fuelles en el sapo hinchado de nuevo para hacer un sapo globo (los fuelles deben estar llenos).

text.en: Drop the balloon toad in the area where Rantz is.
text.es: Suelta el sapo globo en la zona donde está Rantz.

text.en: When a jubbly bird appears, kill it with an ogre bow and pluck it.
text.es: Cuando aparezca un pájaro jubbly, mátalo con un arco de ogro y desplúmalo.

text.en: If a jubbly bird does not spawn by the time the balloon toad disappears, you will need to make another one.
text.es: Si no aparece un pájaro jubbly antes de que el sapo globo desaparezca, tendrás que hacer otro.

text.en: Head north to the ogre spit-roast fire and cook the raw jubbly. If you burn it, you must repeat the hunting process.
text.es: Dirígete al norte hacia la hoguera de asado de ogro y cocina el jubbly crudo. Si lo quemas, deberás repetir el proceso de caza.

text.en: Return to Lumbridge Castle and Use cooked jubbly on Skrach.
text.es: Regresa al Castillo de Lumbridge y usa el jubbly cocinado en Skrach.

text.en: Subquest complete!
text.es: ¡Submisión completada!
